rationale.R1.5: The agent proposes a coherent end-to-end section plan with per-section rationale.
rationale.RX.1: The agent flags uncertainty for several claims, but does not mark confidence and missing evidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output covers a substantially different active set than requested as the agent provides suggestions for reorganization and improvements, which are beyond the scope of the original text.
rationale.RX.4: The output introduces new errors, fabrications, or harmful content by suggesting changes to the original text without verifying external facts.
rationale.RX.5: The output blends sources without traceability as the agent does not annotate every non-cosmetic change with source and reason.
